title: Home row: ASDF JKL;
description: Welcome to Teen Course! Start with the resting position of your fingers.
text: asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl;
finger_focus: Home row — left and right hands
tips: These 8 keys are home base — return here after every keystroke
Feel the bumps on F and J — those are your anchors
Don't look at the keyboard. Trust your hands.

character_tips.anna: Home row first. Find F and J by feel — those bumps are your anchors.
character_tips.maxim: ASDF JKL; — eight keys you'll return to a million times. Start here.
character_tips.knopych: BEEP BOOP! Home row activated! 🤖 Find F and J — those bumps! Got 'em?
character_tips.klavochka: These are your finger pillows, my dear! Cozy and ready 💤
